project.title: GPT GenImage2 2D Game Art Resource Test
project.description: A personal non-commercial AI learning project for testing GPT GenImage2 2D game art resources, including side-view characters, animation previews, and platform backgrounds.

posts.title: Z-Image 123x128 Pixel Art Game Shop UI Set 01
